shared.queryValue:
with order_total as(
	select order_id, Max(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from dwh.fact_sales s
	join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed' and 
		dd.full_date BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
	group by order_id
)
select 
	sum(order_total_amount) / count(order_id) as avg_revenue
from order_total

WITH total_users AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
    FROM dwh.dim_users
    where signup_date BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
),
paying_users as (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_sk) as paying_cnt
    from dwh.fact_sales s
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
    where order_status = 'completed' AND
        dd.full_date BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
)
select paying_cnt::decimal / total_cnt as CR
from total_users, paying_users

select 
    COUNT(distinct order_id)::decimal / COUNT(distinct user_sk) as orders_per_customers
from dwh.fact_sales s
join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
WHERE order_status = 'completed' AND
    dd.full_date BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}

with order_quantity as (
    select order_id, SUM(quantity)
    from dwh.fact_sales
    group by order_id
)

select avg(sum) as items_per_order
from order_quantity

select count(order_id), date_trunc({{scale}}, dd.full_date) as date 
from  dwh.fact_sales s join dwh.dim_date dd ON s.date_id = dd.date_id
where order_status = 'cancelled'
group by date

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id, 
        full_date as date, 
        Max(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed'
	group by order_id, date
),
users_cnt as (
	select 
        COUNT(*)::decimal as user_cnt,
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, signup_date) as date_s
	from dwh.dim_users du
    group by date_s
),
revenue as (
    select 
        SUM(order_total_amount),
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) as date_tr
    from order_total ot
    where date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) BETWEEN        {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date_tr
)

select
    sum / user_cnt as arpu, 
    date_tr,
    case
    when date_tr = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then sum / user_cnt
    when date_tr = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then sum / user_cnt
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from revenue r
join users_cnt u on r.date_tr = u.date_s

select count(Distinct order_id)
from  dwh.fact_sales
where order_status = 'completed'

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id, 
        MAX(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from dwh.fact_sales
	where order_status = 'completed'
	group by order_id
)

select sum(order_total_amount) as revenue
from order_total

with order_t as (
	select 
		order_id,
		Max(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from dwh.fact_sales
	where order_status = 'completed'
	group by order_id

),
users_cnt as (
	select count(distinct user_sk) as user_cnt
	from dwh.fact_sales
)
select SUM(order_total_amount) / user_cnt as arpu
from order_t o, users_cnt
group by user_cnt;

field.title: R
field.formula:
IF [r_score] = 3 THEN COLOR(STR([r_score]), '#58ae55')
ELSEIF [r_score] = 2 THEN COLOR(STR([r_score]), '#d3d317')
ELSE COLOR(STR([r_score]), '#f66758') END

ELSE COLOR(STR([r_score_xzac]), '#f66758') END

shared.queryValue:
with count_orders as(
    select 
        count(distinct order_id), 
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) as date 
    from  dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd ON s.date_id = dd.date_id
    where order_status = 'completed' and
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and {{period_do}}
    group by date)

select 
    count, 
    date,
    case
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then count
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then count
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from count_orders

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id, 
        full_date as date, 
        Max(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed'
	group by order_id, date
),
aov as (
    select 
        avg(order_total_amount) as avg_revenue,
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) as date_tr
    from order_total
    where date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
group by date_tr
)

select
    avg_revenue, 
    date_tr,
    case
    when date_tr = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then avg_revenue
    when date_tr = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then avg_revenue
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from aov

with sum_q as (
select 
    SUM(quantity), 
    date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) as date
from dwh.fact_sales s 
join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
where date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
group by date)

select
    sum, 
    date,
    case
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then sum
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then sum
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from sum_q

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id,
        full_date as date,
        MAX(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from  dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd ON s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed'
	group by order_id, date
),
revenue as (
select 
    sum(order_total_amount),
    date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) as date_tr
from order_total 
where date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
group by date_tr)

select 
    sum, 
    date_tr,
    case
    when date_tr = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then sum
    when date_tr = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then sum
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from revenue

WITH total_users AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
    date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, signup_date) as date_s
    FROM dwh.dim_users
    group by date_s
),
cum_total_users as (
    select 
        sum(total_cnt) over(order by date_s Rows BETWEEN unbounded preceding and current row) as cum_total,
        date_s
    from total_users
),
first_purchase as (
    select 
        user_sk,
        MIN(dd.full_date) as m_date
    from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
    where order_status = 'completed'
    group by user_sk
),
paying_users as (
    select 
        Count(user_sk) as paying_cnt, 
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, m_date) as date
    from first_purchase
    -- where 
    --     date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, m_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date
    order by date
),
cum_paying_users as (
    select 
        sum(paying_cnt) over( Rows BETWEEN unbounded preceding and current row) as cum_paying,
        date
    from paying_users
)

select
    cum_paying::decimal / cum_total *100 as CR , 
    date,
    case
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then cum_paying::decimal / cum_total *100
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then cum_paying::decimal / cum_total *100
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from cum_paying_users  cp
join cum_total_users tu on cp.date = tu.date_s

with product_amount as (
	select 
		product_sk,
		SUM(quantity*price) as amount
	from dwh.fact_sales t
	join dwh.dim_date dd ON t.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed' AND
		full_date >= {{interval_from}} AND 
		full_date <= {{interval_to}}
	group by product_sk
)
select product_name, amount
from product_amount pa 
join dwh.dim_products dp on pa.product_sk = dp.product_sk
order by amount desc
limit 10

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id,
        full_date as date,
        MAX(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from  dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd ON s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed' AND
        full_date >= {{interval_from}} AND 
        full_date <= {{interval_to}}
	group by order_id, date
)
select 
    sum(order_total_amount) as "Выручка",
    Count(Distinct order_id) as "Заказы",
    date_trunc({{scale}}, date) as date_tr
from order_total 
group by date_tr

with count_users as (
    select 
        Count(Distinct user_sk), 
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, signup_date) as date
    from dwh.dim_users du
    where date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, signup_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date)

select
    count, 
    date,
    case
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then count
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then count
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from count_users

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id,
        quantity*price as order_total_amount,
        category
	from dwh.fact_sales s
	join dwh.dim_products dp on s.product_sk = dp.product_sk
        join dwh.dim_date dd ON s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed' AND
                full_date >= {{interval_from}} AND 
                full_date <= {{interval_to}}
)
select 
    category, 
    SUM(order_total_amount)
from order_total
group by category
order by sum desc

widget.name: Столбчатая диаграмма выручки по категориям товаров

shared.queryValue:
select Count(Distinct product_sk) 
from dwh.fact_sales s
join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
where order_status = 'completed' and
    full_date >= {{period_from}} and
    full_date <= {{period_to}}

widget.name: Кол-во уникальных проданных товаро за период

shared.queryValue:
select Count(Distinct product_sk) 
from dwh.fact_sales s
join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
where order_status = 'completed' and
    full_date >= {{period_from}} and
    full_date <= {{period_to}}

select SUM(quantity) / COUNT(Distinct product_sk)::decimal as count
from dwh.fact_sales
where order_status = 'completed'

with count_product_per_user as(
    select SUM(quantity) as count
    from dwh.fact_sales
    where order_status = 'completed'
    group by order_id
)

select avg(count)
from count_product_per_user

select SUM(quantity)
from dwh.fact_sales
where order_status = 'completed'

select 
    count(Distinct order_id) filter(where order_status = 'completed') as "Кол-во доставленных заказов",
    count(Distinct order_id) filter(where order_status = 'cancelled') as "Кол-во отмененных заказов",
    count(Distinct order_id) as "Кол-во заказов",
    date_trunc({{scale}}, dd.full_date) as date 
from  dwh.fact_sales s
join dwh.dim_date dd ON s.date_id = dd.date_id
where full_date >= {{interval_from}} AND 
    full_date <= {{interval_to}}
group by date

with first_purchase as (
select 
	user_sk,
	MIN(dd.full_date) OVER(partition by user_sk) as f_purchase,
	date_trunc('month', full_date) as order_month
from dwh.fact_sales t 
join dwh.dim_date dd on t.date_id = dd.date_id 
where order_status = 'completed'
order by f_purchase
),
cohort as (
	select
		user_sk,
		date_trunc('month', f_purchase)::date as cohort_month
	from first_purchase
)
select
    c.cohort_month,
    DATE_PART('month', AGE(fp.order_month, c.cohort_month)
    ) AS month_number,
    Count(distinct fp.user_sk)::decimal / Max(Count(distinct fp.user_sk)) over(partition by cohort_month) as retention
from first_purchase fp
join cohort c on fp.user_sk = c.user_sk
group by c.cohort_month, order_month

with order_total as(
	select 
        order_id, 
        full_date as date, 
        Max(total_amount) as order_total_amount
	from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
	where order_status = 'completed' and 
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
	group by order_id, date
),
users_cnt as (
	select 
        COUNT(Distinct user_sk)::decimal as user_cnt,
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) as date_s
	from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
    where
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date_s
),
purchase_users as (
    select 
        Count(Distinct user_sk) as paying_users, 
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) as date_tr
    from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
    where order_status = 'completed' AND
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date_tr
),
date_revenue as (
    select 
        SUM(order_total_amount) as revenue,
        COUNT(order_id) as ord_cnt,
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) as date_tr
    from order_total ot
    where date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, date) BETWEEN        {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date_tr
)

select
    revenue / user_cnt as arpu,
    revenue / paying_users as arppu,
    revenue / ord_cnt as aov,
    r.date_tr
from date_revenue r
join users_cnt u on r.date_tr = u.date_s
join purchase_users pu on r.date_tr = pu.date_tr

select 
    Count(Distinct user_sk) as paying_users
from dwh.fact_sales s
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
where order_status = 'completed' AND
    dd.full_date BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}

with count_users as (
    select 
        Count(Distinct user_sk), 
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}},dd.full_date)::date as date
    from dwh.fact_sales s 
    join dwh.dim_date dd on s.date_id = dd.date_id
    where order_status = 'completed' AND
        date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, dd.full_date) BETWEEN {{period_ot}} and  {{period_do}}
    group by date)

select
    count, 
    date,
    case
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_ot}}) then count
    when date = date_trunc({{sp_scale}}, {{period_do}}) then count
    else NULL
    end as start_to_end
from count_users
